reason: The score and justifications are highly accurate. The HP Wiki and fan sources confirm: Lee Jordan's film appearances end after Chamber of Secrets (film 2), so his entire book arc from PoA onward - the partisan McGonagall-baiting commentary, the Niffler harassment of Umbridge, Potterwatch (confirmed as entirely absent from the films, with only an unnamed voice heard in DH Part 1), his Battle of Hogwarts role, and the Fred-and-George friendship dynamic - are all absent from the film corpus. The one minor nuance is that Lee does appear in the OotP film with his name on the DA parchment, but has no actual screen presence or dialogue. A score of 61 is reasonable given he gets some credit for the early films capturing his commentator role and personality basics, while losing everything from PoA onwards.
